融合前世自己的记忆之后，徐清风发现自己发生了一些变化。
捡起地上的一把破木剑，眼前一切豁然开朗。
一遍剑法小成，一眼看破虚实破绽，一剑破万法……
在徐清风眼中一切都是如此的正常。
但对于其他人来讲…

n":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7248828835063776056","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不得不说，很六，写的，前面几章确实不咋地，但是从杀了那个长老后也就开始变好看了特别是从青山四当家开始，主角洒脱，主角因为一顿饭追杀那个寇数千里直至杀死，因为一顿席一顿酒，屠了土匪窝，还有从妖兽手里就下的小女孩，把她送到家，留下一本功法，一句江湖再见，帅炸了，看着真爽不得不说，一个正常少年的武侠梦，一个年轻人都喜欢看的小说[奸笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1687749627,"group_id":"7219704392524500002","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxUBOeq7DxI2dukuTe4S1o8ra1WwnvJmwCRmHBSFtZxi","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2282199847546718","user_name":"爱吃地瓜扣的段家"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2282199847546718","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7219704392524500002","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统】【天才剑道】【剧情流】【仗剑天下】

"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7288310258521883453","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"后期完全放飞自我了，完全没有了剑仙的影子，就像换了个人写一样，境界战力什么的都崩破天际了，从突破顶级王者（王者是这个世界的中层战力而已）之后就直接无敌，破灭万千大道，世界都要靠他罩着"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1696942674,"group_id":"7219704392524500002","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"108241757240"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7219704392524500002","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.15098486e+08"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"6","score_suffix_text":"阅读32小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":116115,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7244916252685747003","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"强者独行，一往无前，这本书很剑仙，也许没有一剑光寒十九洲的波澜壮阔，却有青衣浊酒仗剑走天涯的情怀，与卫红渔的交心有江湖儿女的洒脱，人物刻画很成功"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1686838601,"group_id":"7219704392524500002","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"阅尽千篇皆不是，奈何执笔写书人","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5ZfMHxPAQAri0Kf7BJfBCk=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c2e5ebce81cc40d4bb31d33ba4f540f8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796029&x-signature=%2BLglXXfAS1c0sOZCvNE%2FP1XW7gg%3D","user_id":"108241757240","user_name":"晚城浪客"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"108241757240","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7219704392524500002","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统】【天才剑道】【剧情流】【仗剑天下】
融合前世自己的记忆之后，徐清风发现自己发生了一些变化。
捡起地上的一把破木剑，眼前一切豁然开朗。
一遍剑法小成，一眼看破虚实破绽，一剑破万法……
